name_cn:
Horizontal Bobby in stock!!️
Latest Bobby series crossbody bag, a bag that looks hundreds of times better in person than in pictures 🙋🏻‍♀️, exquisite and stylish, excellent grain calf leather 🐂, both high-end and durable, adjustable strap, very spacious, easily fits two phones, and most importantly, goes perfectly with outfits 😘
size:21*5*12cm
9327
